title: RRB NTPC UG CBT-1 Phase 2
description: Phase 2 exam June 13–20, 2026. Admit card 4 days before exam date at rrb.digialm.com. 8,868 total vacancies.

title: UPSC CSE Prelims Result 2026
description: Result expected June 9–14, 2026 at upsc.gov.in. Exam held on May 24; provisional answer key already released.

title: SSC CGL 2026
description: 12,256 vacancies notified. Apply online by June 22, 2026 at ssc.gov.in. Tier-1 exam: Aug–Sep 2026.

title: UPSC CSE Mains 2026
description: Mains scheduled from August 21, 2026. Start preparation now — window after Prelims result is short.

title: SSC CGL Form Correction Window
description: Application correction window open June 29 – July 1, 2026. Fee payment deadline: June 23.
